name: Strata
description: Bands of sediment pressed into rock — pale near the surface, ochre through the middle, near-black at depth, resettling with each redraw.

code.style: --mid: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --deep: @p(var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -1%; width: 102%; bottom: 0; height: @rand(40%, 92%); background: var(--color1); opacity: @rand(0.75, 1); transition: ease 700ms; } } @match(y > Y / 3) { :before { background: var(--mid); } } @match(y > Y * 2 / 3) { :before { background: var(--deep); } } @random(0.06) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 16%; left: @rand(20%, 64%); top: @rand(30%, 70%); border: calc(24px / @Y) solid var(--color0); border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 0; transform: rotate(@rand(-30deg, 30deg)); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
